title: How to Become a Smart Contract Engineer: A Complete Learning Path
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to becoming a smart contract engineer, covering the full learning roadmap from foundational skills to advanced on-chain development, security auditing, and career growth.

title: Smart Contract Auditing & Screening: Industrial Best Practices Combined with Token Economics
excerpt: A practitioner's guide to auditing and screening smart contracts using industrial best practices, integrating token-economic analysis to evaluate both code security and protocol-level incentive design.

title: Smart Contracts in RWA: How On-Chain Assets Interact with Audit Agencies for SEC and Regulatory Compliance
excerpt: An in-depth exploration of how smart contracts power real-world asset tokenization, the architecture that makes them auditable by the SEC and traditional agencies, and the emerging compliance patterns bridging on-chain and off-chain worlds.

title: Why LLM Army of Agents Outperforms Single LLM: MoE and Multi-Agent Systems
excerpt: Exploring how distributed intelligence through LLM agent armies, Mixture of Experts, and multi-agent systems delivers superior performance compared to monolithic single LLM approaches.

title: GitHub Copilot 集成 Claude Skills：AI 编程助手的新纪元
excerpt: 深入探讨GitHub Copilot集成Claude 3.5 Sonnet的技术架构，包括VS Code扩展集成、智能请求路由、四大核心技能（代码分析、审查、文档生成、测试生成），以及在大型重构、Bug诊断、性能优化等实战场景中的应用。文章详细介绍了Claude的200K tokens超长上下文能力、多层缓存架构、安全隐私保护机制，并分析了开发者工作流集成、成本性能权衡等关键话题。

title: How to Make a New Stablecoin: Complete Technical Design Guide
excerpt: A comprehensive technical guide to designing and implementing stablecoins, covering collateralization mechanisms, price stability algorithms, and lessons from successful projects like USDC, DAI, and USDT.

title: Kiro Spec: TDD-Driven AI Coding
excerpt: Using Kiro-style specifications to drive AI coding with a test-first workflow.

title: Step by Step Making a CEX Match Engine in 10mins
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to building a centralized exchange matching engine from scratch in just 10 minutes, covering order book management, trade execution algorithms, and performance optimization.

title: Step by Step Create Your Own Coin on Solana
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to creating your own SPL token on the Solana blockchain, covering everything from setup to deployment with practical code examples.

title: Drone Working Principles
excerpt: A hands-on walkthrough showing how to train a simulated drone to hover using Genesis + PyTorch, with a 15-minute quick start and practical tips for running on a GPU.
